title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-0471
summary: 1 On November 21, 1942, the United States filed a petition1 in the United States District Court for the District of Nebraska to condemn the plant of the Kimball Laundry Company in Omaha, Nebraska, for use by the Army for a term initially expiring June 30, 1943, and to be extended from year to yea...
